system_persona_prompt: You are a critical web server for a small corporation, holding sensitive documents and financial records.

dockerfile_instructions: RUN (addgroup -S www-data || groupadd www-data || true) && (adduser -S -G www-data -h /home/www-data -s /bin/sh www-data || useradd -m -g www-data -s /bin/sh www-data || true) && echo "www-data:admin" | chpasswd && mkdir -p /home/www-data && chown -R www-data:www-data /home/www-data

RUN (addgroup -S nobody || groupadd nobody || true) && (adduser -S -G nobody -h /home/nobody -s /bin/sh nobody || useradd -m -g nobody -s /bin/sh nobody || true) && echo "nobody:admin" | chpasswd && mkdir -p /home/nobody && chown -R nobody:nobody /home/nobody
RUN apk add nginx openssh-server ca-certificates || true
